description: Machine-readable registry of all official code roots in the Tala repository. Used by agents and tooling to determine file placement.

roots.purpose: Renderer UI — chat interface, settings panel, reflection dashboard, component library
Electron main process, preload scripts, IPC router, and all backend services
Electron-specific unit and integration tests (owned by electron-main subsystem)
Astrological emotional state engine — MCP server exposing emotional bias tools
Core Tala tool surface — MCP server providing file I/O and memory primitives
Mem0-backed long-term memory persistence — MCP server
Graph-structured associative memory layer — MCP server
World-state and context persistence — MCP server
Local model serving runtime configuration and launch scripts (Ollama / llama.cpp)
Test fixture data used by automated tests — not runtime state
Developer diagnostics, simulation harnesses, build packaging, portable distribution scripts
Developer utility scripts not part of the main build or test pipeline
Authoritative project documentation — architecture, features, interfaces, security, traceability
Static frontend assets served by Vite (splash, icons, vendor assets)
Shared pure types, interfaces, enums, and neutral data contracts. NO logic, UI, or side-effects.
Historical reference material — frozen, do not extend
